name: contentforge
description: v3.12.3 fixes two production bugs: (1) dual-copy save — finished .docx now also written to user-visible ~/Documents/ContentForge/<brand>/<type>/<YYYY-MM>/ alongside the internal tracking copy, fixing the 'file isn't saving on local drive' report; (2) per-phase checkpointing via scripts/checkpoint-manager.py + new /contentforge:resume command — interrupted pipeline runs resume from the last completed phase instead of restarting from Phase 1. Also new: /contentforge:output-folder command to reveal the visible output folder in the OS file manager. Open-source enterprise content production pipeline — 19 skills, 13 specialist agents, 11 quality gates, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, fact-checker subagent, three-category internal linking (topical / commercial / authority), real .docx output with embedded SEO + Quality + Production + Internal-Link appendices. **EU AI Act Article 50 ready** — C2PA content provenance signing for the .docx output (applicable 2 Aug 2026) via --c2pa-sign on scripts/generate-docx.py with .docx-embed-if-supported + verifiable .c2pa.json sidecar fallback. Installs on **5 coding-agent surfaces**: Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers .claude-plugin/plugin.json), Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental). Single skills/ directory shared across all platforms. **v3.12.1** adds Star History, community-standards files (CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, PR + Issue templates), and rewrites the README for organic discoverability with social-proof badges + maintainer block (linkedin.com/in/askneelnow + x.com/askneelnow). **v3.12.0** added Copilot CLI + experimental Antigravity install surfaces. **v3.11.0** added Codex + Cursor manifests. **v3.10.0** added the C2PA .docx signing. v3.9.6 reflected Google's March 2026 core update demoting FAQ/HowTo/Review schema. v3.9 humanizer with 29-pattern AI-detection catalog. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs (16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors catalogued in .mcp.json.connectors-reference). MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and SocialForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): aliases like latest-balanced-anthropic / latest-vision-google resolve to concrete ids at call time; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
